known_warnings.match: The ReportingExtension.file(String) method has been deprecated.
known_warnings.reason: Detekt Gradle plugin 1.23.8 calls the Gradle API scheduled for removal in Gradle 10; retain visibility until an upstream-compatible stable plugin is adopted.

known_warnings.match: asset-delivery-ktx-2.3.0-runtime.jar: D8: Invalid stack map table
known_warnings.reason: The official Play Asset Delivery integration guide still documents version 2.3.0; keep the warning visible until an official compatible release or verified fallback removal is available.

known_warnings.match: ASM Instrumentation process wasn't able to resolve some classes
known_warnings.reason: The unresolved classes are Compose tooling, Window Extensions/Sidecar provided APIs, and sun.misc.Unsafe; preserve the class list in the report and review on every toolchain update.
